issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering enrollment in multiple workflow branches simultaneously, causing HAs and TCs to receive duplicate tasks. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding these terminal deal stages as unenrollment criteria. A tweak to the filters was applied on March 9th to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails sending with previous loan officer's info after LO change
issues.desc: After a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails to agents continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated LO. The issue affected at least one deal where Paul remained listed instead of the correct LO Julie Yocum. Luis investigated and resolved the issue on the same day it was reported.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any agent-facing emails for deals that had an LO change during the impact window to ensure the correct LO information is communicated.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that toggled back and forth between stages
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not included as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted a second time during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their assigned tasks for closing coordination. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and believed to be a HubSpot-side problem. HubSpot support confirmed a fix was applied on April 1st.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll affected MRC deals into the TC workflow and send any closing information collection emails manually for deals that fell in the impact window.
